description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a compact, angular frame and a dark blue-black finish adorned with stylized white and light blue graphics. The slide features a prominent red front sight and engraved text reading 'REMEMBER > 7355608' on both sides, along with a distinctive white emblem resembling a stylized bird or wings. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured surface for enhanced handling, and it displays additional white graphics and logos. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The magazine base is slightly extended and flat, with a subtle bevel for easier reloading and a black finish that contrasts with the rest of the frame.
description: A compact, modern handgun with a dark blue-black finish, white graphics, and a red front sight. It features engraved markings, a textured ergonomic grip, and a flat, extended magazine base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, red front sight, and the top of the slide with white graphics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the engraved text, white emblem, detailed grip texture, and trigger guard shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, rear sight, and the full contour of the grip and magazine base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing mirrored engravings, white graphics, and the ergonomic grip design.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a textured surface that appears stippled for enhanced traction. It is decorated with white, angular graphics and a stylized emblem, likely for visual distinction or branding. The lower portion of the grip includes subtle finger grooves for improved control, and the material has a matte, slightly grippy finish. The backstrap is smoothly integrated, and the overall design suggests a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a generous opening to accommodate gloved fingers. Its lower edge is slightly undercut, allowing for a higher grip on the handgun. The guard is thick and smoothly contoured, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a streamlined appearance that blends seamlessly with the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and compact, consistent with a standard semi-automatic handgun profile. It is not visibly threaded or ported, and there are no external compensators or suppressor threads. The exterior finish matches the slide, with a dark, matte appearance and no additional markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features the inscription 'REMEMBER > 7355608' in a clear, modern font on both sides, positioned centrally. There are also stylized white emblems resembling wings or a bird, located near the rear and lower portions of the slide. The markings are prominent and contrast sharply with the dark background, enhancing visibility and adding a unique visual identity.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight extension beyond the grip, providing additional surface area for secure handling during reloads. It has a beveled edge for smoother insertion and removal, and the finish is solid black, contrasting with the rest of the grip. The design is simple and functional, with no visible finger rests or logos.
